dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE & ADMINISTRATION • The 14-day lead-in period with immediate-release nevirapine tablets (200 mg once daily) must be strictly followed; it has been demonstrated to reduce the frequency of rash. ( 2.5 , 5.2 ) • Must be swallowed whole and must not be chewed, crushed, or divided. ( 2.1 ) • Adult patients must initiate therapy with one 200 mg immediate-release nevirapine tablet once daily for the first 14 days, followed by one 400 mg tablet of nevirapine extended-release tablets once daily.
